meta.prepared_by: Claude agent — full-site live-test PRD (supersedes 2026-06-04 generated PRD)
companion_docs: DECISIONS.md (DEC-20260610-01 strict commission, DEC-20260610-02 nightly audit)

product_overview: TG Clinic Management System is a React-based clinic web application for the NK3/TMV deployment managing authentication, customers, employees, appointments, payments, services, reports, permissions, consultant (CTV) network with per-service commission, a CTV self-service portal with QR discount vouchers, public visitor flows, and a two-database Cosmetic line of business. Testing targets the LIVE site; all tests must respect the three safety lanes: Lane A read-only (default), Lane B disposable writes using ZZ_TESTSPRITE_/testsprite-marked data only, Lane C money/permission mutations PROHIBITED (no payments, deposits, voids, refunds, payouts, permission edits).
core_goals: Verify secure admin authentication, session handling, and role-based route guarding on the live site
Verify customer/employee/consultant management with accent-insensitive search
Verify appointment scheduling across calendar views
Verify payment surfaces render and guard correctly WITHOUT moving money (Lane C)
Verify service catalog and the strict CTV commission attribution rule (DEC-20260610-01)
Verify the CTV portal: dashboard, referrals, QR discount voucher generation
Verify the staff QR verify-discount scan path end-to-end
Verify public visitor flows: fan discount landing and public CTV join
Verify Cosmetic LOB isolation (two-DB; cosmetic routes never read dental data)
Produce screenshot/video/network evidence for every failure with bug classification

features.name: Authentication and Authorization
features.description: Admin login, session, role-based access. Lane A.
user_flows: Open /login -> Enter t@clinic.vn / 123123 -> Land on /overview with dashboard data and zero console/API errors
Login with invalid credentials -> 401 -> Remain on /login with a visible Vietnamese error message
Logout -> Session cleared -> Protected route redirects back to /login
Deep-link a protected route while logged out -> Redirect to /login?returnTo=... -> Login -> Land back on the original route (returnTo bounce)

features.name: Admin Shell Route Sweep
features.description: Every sidebar route renders without crash, blank screen, or API error banner. CORRECT route paths: /overview, /customers, /calendar, /payment (NOT /payments), /services, /reports, /employees, /permissions (NOT /settings/permissions), /settings, /commission, /feedback. Lane A.
user_flows: Visit each sidebar route in sequence as admin -> Each renders headed content -> No blank main panel, no uncaught console error, no failing API call

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Search, profile, create/edit (Lane B with ZZ_TESTSPRITE_ prefix), delete requires confirmation and is NOT completed (Lane A observation only).
user_flows: Open /customers -> List renders -> Search 'nguyen' (no accents) -> Accent-insensitive matches including 'Nguyễn' appear
Open a customer profile -> Tabs render (info, services, payments, journey) -> No API errors
Lane B: Create customer ZZ_TESTSPRITE_<timestamp> -> 201 -> Edit a field -> Saved -> Soft-delete the same ZZ record at the end of the run
Click delete on a customer -> Confirmation dialog appears -> Cancel -> Customer unchanged (never confirm on non-ZZ data)

features.name: Employee Management with Permission Groups
features.description: Employee CRUD (Lane B, ZZ_TESTSPRITE_ prefix), search, permission group assignment display. Permission EDITS are Lane C (prohibited).
user_flows: Open /employees -> List renders -> Search by name -> Filtered results
Lane B: Create employee ZZ_TESTSPRITE_EMP_<timestamp> with a basic group -> 201 -> Edit name -> Saved -> Deactivate/remove at end of run
Open /permissions -> Permission board renders groups and employees -> Toggles visible -> DO NOT save any permission change (Lane C)

features.name: Appointment Calendar
features.description: Day/week/month views, appointment create/edit with disposable data (Lane B).
user_flows: Open /calendar -> Day view renders appointments -> Switch week/month -> Data loads per view
Lane B: Create appointment for a ZZ_TESTSPRITE_ customer -> Appears on calendar -> Change its status -> Status persists -> Cancel/delete it at end of run
Create appointment with missing required fields -> Validation error -> Nothing created

features.name: Payment Surfaces (READ-ONLY — Lane C guard)
features.description: Payment history and allocation surfaces render; money actions are NEVER submitted. Verifies paid-out commission locks exist (INV-003B).
user_flows: Open /payment -> History renders with filters -> Open a payment detail -> Allocations visible -> Close without changes
Open the new-payment form -> Form renders fields and VietQR area -> Abandon WITHOUT submitting (Lane C)
Observe void/delete controls exist on a paid record -> DO NOT click confirm

features.name: Service Catalog and Strict CTV Commission (DEC-20260610-01)
features.description: Service catalog CRUD-light plus THE core commission rule: a service card earns CTV commission ONLY when a CTV is explicitly selected. No CTV selected => saleorders.ctv_id stays NULL and ZERO earnings, even for a referred customer. Clearing a card's CTV reverses pending earnings; paid-out earnings block reassignment (409).
user_flows: Open /services -> Catalog renders -> Search/filter works
Lane B (cosmetic LOB): On a ZZ_TESTSPRITE_ customer, create a service WITHOUT selecting a CTV -> Service saves -> Commission/earnings views show NO new earnings for any CTV from this service

Lane B (cosmetic LOB): Create a service WITH an explicit CTV selected -> Service saves -> Pending earnings appear for that CTV at full service price percentage -> Edit the service and clear the CTV -> Pending earnings reversed
Cleanup: soft-delete all ZZ_TESTSPRITE_ services created

features.name: Permission Matrix and RBAC (READ-ONLY)
features.description: Permission board at /permissions renders matrix; CTV accounts resolve to exactly the 3 CTV permissions and no staff groups. Edits prohibited (Lane C).
user_flows: Open /permissions as admin -> Matrix renders groups, employees, toggles
Login as a CTV account -> Admin routes are gated/redirected -> CTV sees only the CTV portal

features.name: Reports and Excel Export
features.description: Report views render; exports download (read-only on data).
user_flows: Open /reports -> Report cards render -> Open appointments/deposits/revenue previews -> Data renders
Trigger an Excel export -> File downloads (or link produced) -> No API error

features.name: CTV Admin Module (Commission, Network, Management)
features.description: Admin commission page, CTV management tab (SSOT CtvCreationForm), network hierarchy, tier config display. Tier config EDITS prohibited.
user_flows: Open /commission -> Commission summary renders per CTV with level breakdown and payout status

Open CTV management -> CTV list renders -> Lane B: create CTV ZZ_TESTSPRITE_CTV_<timestamp> via the Add CTV modal (email optional, lob defaults dental) -> 201 -> New CTV can log in -> Deactivate at end of run
Open a CTV's network/hierarchy view -> Upline/downline renders

features.name: CTV Self-Service Portal
features.description: CTV login lands on /ctv portal: dashboard, referrals ('Giới thiệu/QR'), earnings, profile. Admin surface is inaccessible.
user_flows: Login as CTV (e.g. ctv-c-0531demo@clinic.vn / Test1234!) -> Land on /ctv dashboard -> Stats render
Open Giới thiệu/QR tab -> Referral list renders with earnings attribution
Open Me/profile tab -> Edit own profile -> Save -> Change password modal opens (do not change the shared demo password)
Navigate directly to /overview as CTV -> Gated/redirected, no admin data

features.name: CTV QR Discount Voucher (FM-20260610-01/02 regression)
features.description: Portal voucher generation and staff verify path. The QR encodes {origin}/verify-discount?code=<CODE>. Codes lifecycle: claimed/active -> checked_in -> used. Completion uses the customer bound at check-in regardless of screen LOB (FM-20260610-02).
user_flows: CTV portal -> Giới thiệu/QR -> Mã QR sub-tab -> Click 'Tạo mã & tải ảnh' -> POST /api/discount-codes/generate returns 200 -> Voucher card renders with code and QR canvas -> History list shows the code as claimed
Force an API failure (e.g. offline) on generate -> A visible role=alert error banner appears (no silent failure)
Staff scan path: open /verify-discount?code=<CODE> logged out -> Redirect to /login?returnTo=... -> Staff login bounces back -> Code auto-validated with CTV name and discount label

Staff check-in: select LOB, enter customer phone (ZZ_TESTSPRITE_ client), verify -> Code becomes checked_in -> Reload page -> Complete (Hoàn tất mã) WITHOUT re-resolving the client -> 200 -> Code used, staff name stamped
Lane note: each generated test code is disposable; record codes in the run report for cleanup

features.name: Public Visitor Flows (Unauthenticated)
features.description: Fan discount landing and public CTV join. No auth required; must NOT fall through to admin routes.
user_flows: Open /ctv/discount/CTV-<id6> (fan landing) -> CTV name + voucher QR render -> No redirect to admin Overview
Open /ctv/join with a referral code -> Join form renders with upline resolved -> Submit with missing fields -> Validation errors with red borders -> Nothing created
Lane B: complete a join as ZZ_TESTSPRITE_JOIN_<timestamp> with valid data -> Account created under the sharer -> Deactivate at end of run

features.name: Cosmetic Line of Business Isolation
features.description: Two-DB topology: cosmetic surfaces use tcosmetic_nk3 via getDb('cosmetic'); dental data never leaks into cosmetic lists and vice versa. LOB switch is per-session UI state.
user_flows: Switch to Cosmetic LOB -> /customers lists cosmetic clients only -> /services lists cosmetic catalog -> Create/search flows hit /api/cosmetic/* endpoints
Switch back to Dental -> Dental lists return -> No cosmetic rows mixed in
Open a cosmetic customer profile -> Journey/services/payments are cosmetic-DB rows only

features.name: Settings (READ-ONLY)
features.description: Settings pages render; nothing is saved.
user_flows: Open /settings -> Sections render (business units, locations, sources) -> Navigate tabs -> DO NOT save changes

safety_lanes.A_read_only: Default for every test. Navigation, search, render checks, exports.
safety_lanes.B_disposable_writes: Allowed ONLY with ZZ_TESTSPRITE_ prefixed names (customers, employees, CTVs, appointments, services). Every created row must be cleaned up (soft-delete/deactivate) at the end of the run and listed in the report.
safety_lanes.C_prohibited: NEVER: payments, deposits, allocations, voids, refunds, payouts, permission/tier-config edits, settings saves, deleting non-ZZ data, changing shared demo passwords.

evidence_per_failure: classification: product bug | auth blocker | stale route assumption | safety-lane block | timeout | needs-human-decision
test_execution_rules.known_correct_routes: /payment (not /payments), /permissions (not /settings/permissions), CTV portal at /ctv, staff verify at /verify-discount, fan landing at /ctv/discount/:shortCode

project.name: tgclinic-website
project.type: Frontend Web Application (React 18 + TypeScript + Vite) against Express/Postgres two-DB backend

backend.databases: Postgres two-DB: tdental_nk3 + tcosmetic_nk3 via getDb(lob)

recent_behavior_changes: 0.36.2: CTV QR generate + staff verify fixed (double-encoded body, fetchCodeRow db arg, $9 cast) — FM-20260610-01
0.36.3: verify completion uses the customer bound at check-in (wrong-LOB completion screen safe) — FM-20260610-02
0.37.0: strict CTV commission attribution — no referrer inheritance at service create — DEC-20260610-01
